nav.title: Main Navigation
nav.description: A list of links to navigate the site.

bonapp.title: Bonapp
bonapp.shortDescription: Restaurant CRM focused on commercial operations, relationship management, and product evolution inside Assessoria Alpha.

caseStudy.summary: I led the development direction of Bonapp as a strategic product initiative inside Assessoria Alpha, helping shape a clearer foundation for growth, integrations, and product expansion.
caseStudy.problem: The challenge was to consolidate a restaurant CRM with strong internal strategic potential while aligning product vision, operational needs, and future expansion without exposing unnecessary complexity to end users.
caseStudy.role: My role was centered on product and delivery leadership. I defined direction, priorities, and alignment between business and technology while guiding the product evolution without directly contributing code.
caseStudy.solution: I helped drive the product definition around operational clarity, scalable feature growth, and tighter connections with other digital fronts in the company ecosystem, including commercial and menu-related opportunities.
caseStudy.stack: SaaS product strategy, CRM workflows, product definition, cross-functional alignment, and integration between digital and commercial operations.
caseStudy.impact: Bonapp gained a more consistent strategic direction and a stronger foundation for continuous evolution, positioning it as a product with long-term relevance inside the company.
caseStudy.confidentialityNote: This case study has been sanitized to protect internal business details, proprietary decisions, operational workflows, and non-public visual assets.

growthHub.title: Growth Hub
growthHub.shortDescription: Internal platform for leads, auctions, credits, and automations with strong emphasis on architecture, security, and business rules.

caseStudy.summary: I led and directly contributed to the technical evolution of Growth Hub, a critical internal platform supporting commercial and financial operations with complex workflows and integrations.
caseStudy.problem: The platform needed to support sensitive flows involving leads, automation, credits, payments, and access governance, requiring stronger architecture, better security, and a more maintainable foundation.
caseStudy.role: I worked across technical leadership and hands-on execution. That included architecture evolution, security strengthening, technical organization, and implementation work on important parts of the system foundation.
caseStudy.solution: I drove improvements in architecture, governance, technical structure, and module integration, helping create a more stable base for realtime behavior, triggers, access policies, automations, and business rule expansion.
caseStudy.stack: TypeScript, Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Supabase, integrations, realtime flows, triggers, RLS, and finance-related workflows.
caseStudy.impact: The platform moved to a more secure, organized, and scalable foundation, making future product growth and operational changes more sustainable.
caseStudy.confidentialityNote: This case omits internal architecture details, security policies, proprietary workflows, finance rules, and non-public interface elements.

dashboardComercial.title: Commercial CRM
dashboardComercial.shortDescription: Internal lead-management CRM conceived to bring more structure and visibility to the SDR and closer workflow.

caseStudy.summary: I conceived and led the evolution of the Commercial CRM as a strategic initiative to organize the sales process and improve visibility over leads, statuses, and negotiations.
caseStudy.problem: The commercial operation depended on an older structure with no dedicated backend and limited ability to scale, control, and organize the team workflow effectively.
caseStudy.role: My contribution was centered on ideation and leadership. I shaped the project direction, aligned the solution with the commercial operation, and guided the initiative without hands-on coding.
caseStudy.solution: The project was restructured into a clearer and more scalable solution, separating frontend and API responsibilities while improving lead management, operational visibility, and support for commercial decision-making.
caseStudy.stack: Internal CRM, frontend + API architecture, sales workflows, lead management, and operational tracking.
caseStudy.impact: The commercial team gained a more organized operating structure, better status traceability, and a stronger base to support future growth.
caseStudy.confidentialityNote: This case preserves internal sales funnel logic, proprietary workflow details, business rules, and sensitive operational information.

erpApi.title: ERP / ERP API
erpApi.shortDescription: Integration and process-support layer connecting internal rules, systems, and operational dependencies across the company.

caseStudy.summary: I led and coded part of the ERP/API initiative to strengthen internal integrations and support operational flows that other company systems depend on.
caseStudy.problem: The operation needed a reliable foundation to connect areas, standardize internal rules, and support dependencies between systems without introducing fragile coupling or rework.
caseStudy.role: I contributed through technical leadership and hands-on execution, supporting structural decisions while implementing relevant parts of the integration foundation.
caseStudy.solution: I worked on organizing the integration layer and reinforcing the technical base that supports internal workflows, helping position the ERP API as a more consistent foundation for other company initiatives.
caseStudy.stack: TypeScript, NestJS, internal APIs, integrations, operational rules, and support for multiple internal product fronts.
caseStudy.impact: The company gained a more reliable base for connecting processes, reducing fragile dependencies, and enabling future integrations with more predictability.
caseStudy.confidentialityNote: This case removes details about internal contracts, specific integrations, proprietary operational rules, and restricted workflows.

npsOperacional.title: Operational NPS
npsOperacional.shortDescription: Internal application focused on operational satisfaction and feedback tracking to support continuous improvement.

caseStudy.summary: I led and contributed to the development of Operational NPS to create a more structured way of capturing feedback and perception inside the operation.
caseStudy.problem: The team needed to transform scattered feedback and satisfaction signals into a clearer flow that could support analysis, learning, and continuous operational improvement.
caseStudy.role: I worked in both technical leadership and hands-on execution, helping define the solution direction while contributing directly to implementation.
caseStudy.solution: I supported the creation of an application that centralizes this monitoring with a clearer structure and a technical base prepared for future evolution and internal integrations.
caseStudy.stack: TypeScript, Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, internal integrations, and operational workflow organization.
caseStudy.impact: The operation gained a more structured feedback front, improving visibility into recurring signals and enabling more deliberate process evolution.
caseStudy.confidentialityNote: This case study is intentionally sanitized to avoid exposing internal satisfaction data, sensitive workflows, or non-public operational decisions.

acaiEmBrasilia.title: Açaí em Brasília
acaiEmBrasilia.shortDescription: Public-facing institutional website built to strengthen the brand's digital presence, commercial communication, and browsing experience.
acaiEmBrasilia.fullDescription: I developed and led the delivery of the Açaí em Brasília website with a focus on clear digital presence, smooth navigation, and a visual experience aligned with the brand. The project was designed to communicate the business more effectively, support the customer discovery journey, and provide a modern foundation for expanding the company's online presence.

finestFlights.title: Finest Flights
finestFlights.shortDescription: Responsive front-end solution for an airline ticket sales platform, ensuring a seamless booking experience on any device.
finestFlights.fullDescription: Developed and maintain a high-performance, responsive front-end for Finest Flights, a global airline ticket company. The solution, built with Next.js and TypeScript, provides a seamless user experience, driving ticket sales and customer satisfaction. Ongoing work includes developing new features to meet evolving market demands.

theInteriorEdge.title: The Interior Edge
theInteriorEdge.shortDescription: Elegant and responsive portfolio website to showcase high-end flooring solutions, driving leads from large builders.
theInteriorEdge.fullDescription: Created a visually stunning and fully responsive website for The Interior Edge, a leader in flooring solutions. The site effectively showcases their extensive portfolio to major construction companies, generating qualified leads. Built with React, the solution provides a clean, modern, and professional online presence that reflects the quality of their work.

coffeeShopTiaRosa.title: Coffee Shops Tia Rosa
coffeeShopTiaRosa.shortDescription: Engaging and responsive website to boost a local coffee shop's digital presence and attract more customers.
coffeeShopTiaRosa.fullDescription: Developed a charming and responsive website to help Coffee Shops Tia Rosa connect with its community online. The platform effectively showcases their menu, location, and unique story, creating an inviting digital experience that drives foot traffic and builds customer loyalty. Built with Next.js, the site is fast, accessible, and easy to manage.

personalPortfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
personalPortfolio.shortDescription: A responsive personal portfolio to showcase my skills and successfully attract freelance and full-time opportunities.
personalPortfolio.fullDescription: This is the very portfolio you are browsing. I developed it as a practical demonstration of my technical abilities and design sense. The fully responsive and interactive experience is built to attract clients and employers by showcasing my work effectively. The tech stack includes Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion for smooth animations, and next-intl for internationalization.

sertanejoMadeiras.title: Sertanejo Madeiras
sertanejoMadeiras.shortDescription: A clean, responsive, and easy-to-navigate product catalog for a lumber company, delivering on the client's vision for simplicity.
sertanejoMadeiras.fullDescription: Delivered a clean and effective online presence for Sertanejo Madeiras, focusing on a simple and direct user experience as requested by the client. The responsive website, built with React, functions as a digital catalog, making it easy for customers to find product information, which has led to an increase in sales inquiries.

hero.name: Max Paulo
hero.title: Software Developer
hero.subtitle: Building custom, high-quality solutions to bring your ideas to life. Explore my projects below and let's connect to turn your vision into reality.

cta1.text: Enjoyed my work or have an idea you'd like to discuss?

cta2.text: Ready to take the next step? I'm here to help.

cta3.text: Have a project in mind? Let's build something great together.

aboutSection.title: About Me
aboutSection.paragraph1: Hello! I'm Maxwell Paulo, a Software Developer passionate about building digital solutions that merge creativity with performance. With a degree in Advertising and nearly a decade of experience as a teacher, I developed a unique skill for communication and understanding people—competencies that are now the foundation for translating my clients' needs into intuitive and effective products. The same discipline that led me to jump out of planes as a skydiver is what I apply to overcome complex development challenges.
aboutSection.paragraph2: My transition into tech was driven by a continuous quest for growth. I deepened my knowledge in top-tier bootcamps like Ironhack and Cubos Academy and continue to specialize with a degree in Analysis and Systems Development. With hands-on experience in startups, international projects, and freelance work, I've worked with technologies like React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, and Django. I'm always ready to apply this versatility and dedication to bring your next big idea to life. Shall we talk?

headOfTechnology.description: Leading the technology area by connecting business strategy with technical execution across internal products, systems, infrastructure, and automation. Responsible for evolving architecture, strengthening processes, improving delivery efficiency, enhancing security, and positioning technology as a strategic pillar for company growth.

techLead.description: Provided technical leadership across multiple initiatives, coordinating developers, defining priorities, supporting architecture decisions, and ensuring delivery quality. I also remained hands-on in development, integrations, technical workflow organization, and the evolution of internal products.

fullStackDeveloper.description: Built full-stack solutions for internal products and systems, working on interfaces, APIs, integrations, business rules, and performance improvements. Actively contributed to the technical evolution of product foundations while supporting strategic operational demands.

exp1.description: Developing and maintaining the frontend for a global travel platform using Next.js and TypeScript. Responsibilities include implementing new features, optimizing performance, and ensuring a clean, scalable architecture in a fast-paced, agile environment.

exp2.description: Contributed to a fintech startup by developing new features and optimizing existing code in a full-stack environment with React, Python, and Django. I was responsible for maintaining code quality and collaborating within an agile team to enhance the platform.

exp3.company: Public Defender's Office of the Federal District
exp3.description: Engaged in the full lifecycle of a legacy system refactoring project, moving it to a modern React-based stack. Participated in requirements gathering, specification, testing, and implementation, contributing to significant system improvements.

exp4.description: Provided technical support for the Ministry of Social Development, resolving remote demands efficiently. This role honed my time management, attention to detail, and client-facing communication skills.

exp5.description: Planned and delivered customized English lessons for students of all ages. This entrepreneurial experience strengthened my ability to understand client needs, adapt strategies, and communicate complex topics clearly.

exp6.description: Taught English to children and adolescents, developing structured lesson plans and fostering an engaging learning environment. This position was foundational in building my communication and planning skills.

exp7.description: Managed social media for a philanthropic organization, developing content and designing graphics. This role linked my advertising background with digital execution and creative strategy.

exp8.description: My first role as an educator, where I planned and delivered English classes to teenagers and adults. This experience was crucial for developing my public speaking abilities and attention to detail.

edu1.title: Systems Analysis and Development
edu1.description: Pursuing a comprehensive degree focused on software engineering principles, database management, systems architecture, and project management. This program provides a strong theoretical foundation to complement my practical development experience.

edu2.title: Backend Software Development
edu2.description: An intensive bootcamp focused on server-side development. Gained in-depth knowledge of Node.js, REST APIs, database modeling with PostgreSQL, authentication, and system architecture, solidifying my full-stack capabilities.

edu3.title: Full-Stack Web Development
edu3.description: A hands-on, project-based bootcamp covering the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js). Mastered fundamental and advanced concepts of web development, from building responsive front-ends to creating powerful APIs.

edu4.title: Bachelor of Advertising and Propaganda
edu4.description: This degree provided a strong foundation in communication and creative strategy. It sharpened my ability to understand target audiences and craft compelling narratives—skills that are now invaluable in designing intuitive user experiences.

contactSection.title: Get in Touch
contactSection.subtitle: Ready to bring your project to life? I'm always open to discussing new ideas and opportunities. Let's connect and explore how we can build something great together. Reach out below to get started.
contactSection.formTitle: Or Send Me a Message Directly
contactSection.formMessagePlaceholder: What would you like to say?
